name: self-healing-playwright-framework
description: agentic-platform monorepo — multi-framework healing + autonomous QA + maintenance (single source of truth)

scripts.build:agent: npm run build:core && npm run build -w ai-healing-agent
scripts.build:cypress: npm run build:agent && npm run build -w ai-healing-cypress
scripts.build:selenium: npm run build:agent && npm run build -w ai-healing-selenium
scripts.build:sdk: npm run build:core && npm run build -w ai-healing-sdk
scripts.build:autonomous-qa-sdk: npm run build:sdk && npm run build -w autonomous-qa-sdk
scripts.pack:sdk: npm run build:sdk && mkdir -p dist-packages && npm pack -w ai-healing-sdk --pack-destination ./dist-packages
scripts.publish:all-slices-github: npm run publish:agentic-platform-github && npm run publish:healing-platform-github && npm run publish:healing-sdk-github
scripts.install:plug-and-play-demo: npm run build:sdk && npm install --prefix examples/playwright-plug-and-play
scripts.install:nova-retail-qa: npm run build:autonomous-qa-sdk && npm run build:autonomous-test-agent && npm install --prefix examples/nova-retail-qa
scripts.test:plug-and-play: npm run install:plug-and-play-demo && npm run test:headed --prefix examples/playwright-plug-and-play
scripts.test:plug-and-play:ci: npm run install:plug-and-play-demo && npm test --prefix examples/playwright-plug-and-play
scripts.build:locator-agent: npm run build:sdk && npm run build -w locator-agent
scripts.build:autonomous-test-agent: npm run build:autonomous-contracts && npm run build -w autonomous-test-agent
scripts.build:llm-locator-agent: npm run build:sdk && npm run build -w llm-provider && npm run build -w locator-agent && npm run build -w llm-locator-agent
scripts.build:healing-service: npm run build:llm-locator-agent && npm run build -w healing-service
scripts.healing-service: npm run build:healing-service && npm run start -w healing-service
scripts.test:llm-agent: npm run build:llm-locator-agent && RUN_UNIT_TESTS=1 playwright test tests/llm-provider.unit.spec.ts tests/llm-locator-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/agentic-healing.unit.spec.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run build:llm-locator-agent && RUN_UNIT_TESTS=1 playwright test tests/dom-scan-discovery.unit.spec.ts tests/healing-service.unit.spec.ts tests/locator-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/llm-provider.unit.spec.ts tests/llm-locator-agent.unit.spec.ts tests/agentic-healing.unit.spec.ts
